summary: Full frontend test of LaunchPath homepage rebuild. All major sections verified: Hero, FourPillars, FailureReality, PenaltyTable, TCO, ThreePaths, AboutSection, WhoNotFor, NextStep, FinalCTA. Navbar gold OPERATOR PORTAL button verified. Other pages (Knowledge Center, About) load correctly. TCO calculator functional with results displayed.

ui_bugs.issue: Button background is orange rgb(232,89,15) instead of gold #C5A059 per new color system. The other CTA buttons (Hero, FinalCTA) are correctly gold.

issues: CALCULATE EXPOSURE button is orange (old color) instead of gold #C5A059 per Color Correction Brief

action_items: Fix TCOSection CALCULATE EXPOSURE button color from orange to gold #C5A059
Add data-testid='philosophical-line-section' to PhilosophicalLineSection component (currently has 0 testid elements found)
critical_code_review_comments: PhilosophicalLineSection renders italic text correctly but lacks data-testid attribute for automated testing
TCO calculate button uses old orange color - should use var(--gold-primary) or #C5A059
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major rebuild verified passing. All sections present in correct order. FourPillars (4 cards with gold borders), FailureReality (49/96.4%/10+ stats), PenaltyTable (DIRECT PENALTIES/HIDDEN OPERATIONAL DRAIN 2-col), ThreePaths ($2,500 for LaunchPath, $5,000 for competitor WAIT path - correct), TCO calculator functional, AboutSection has 'I did not come from trucking' + manufacturing background, WhoNotFor (4 disqualifiers), NextStep (4 stages 01-04), FinalCTA present. Navbar OPERATOR PORTAL button is gold bordered (rgb(197,160,89)). ISSUE: CALCULATE EXPOSURE button in TCO section is orange not gold.
